```{=html}
<aside class="side-panel notation-sidebar">
<details open>
<summary>Simulator notation</summary>
<p>Symbols introduced on the
<a href="phase-a.qmd#setup-and-notation">Model page</a>. The Simulator
admits raw inventory state instead of a scalar coverage:</p>
<dl>
  <dt><code>k</code>, <code>C<sub>basis</sub></code></dt>
  <dd>Pre-purchased inventory (kVCM) and its sunk USD cost.</dd>

  <dt><code>α = min(1, k / (N · P))</code></dt>
  <dd>Coverage — fraction of the horizon the inventory lasts.</dd>

  <dt><code>k<sub>left</sub> = max(0, k − N · P)</code></dt>
  <dd>Leftover tokens at <code>T</code> when over-hedged.</dd>

  <dt><code>J<sub>α</sub> = ∫<sub>αT</sub><sup>T</sup> S<sub>t</sub> dt</code></dt>
  <dd>Integral over the uncovered window.</dd>

  <dt><code>Π<sub>cust</sub></code></dt>
  <dd><code>Q·N − C<sub>basis</sub> − P·λ·J<sub>α</sub> + k<sub>left</sub>·S<sub>T</sub></code>.
  Reduces to matched at <code>α = 1</code>, back-to-back at
  <code>k = C<sub>basis</sub> = 0</code>.</dd>

  <dt>Jump sliders</dt>
  <dd>Set <code>λ<sub>J</sub> = 0</code> for pure GBM; otherwise the
  process is compensated Merton, so means survive but SD / VaR / CVaR
  inflate.</dd>
</dl>
</details>
</aside>
```
